hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$'; then cd ~/lapc-invoice-maker && npx next lint --file "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" --quiet 2>/dev/null; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '(\.env|\.lock)$'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Do not edit .env or lock files directly' >&2; exit 1; fi
